name: bitBoard
description: A customizable crypto price dashboard for node
compose:
name: slashnode-bitboard
services:
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/egzola/bitboard:1.0.0
    container_name: bitboard
    user: "0:0"
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PORT: '3711'
    volumes:
      - app_data:/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3711:3711
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data:
    name: slashnode-bitboard_app_data
